---
title: "Cooperative & Legacy Genres"
aliases: []
family: "Systems & Mechanics"
media: []
facets:
  effects: []
  problems: []
  components: []
  genre: []
provenance: ""
---

<!-- STUB — Phase 2 outline. Prose gated until Phase 4. Tracked in #49. -->

<!-- BACKLINKS:START (generated by scripts/backlinks.py — do not edit by hand) -->

## Referenced by

- [Fabrication & Sourcing](../space-props-materiality/fabrication-and-sourcing.qmd)

<!-- BACKLINKS:END -->
